app.title: CECB Environmental Clearance System
app.ministryName: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change
app.ministryNameHindi: पर्यावरण, वन और जलवायु परिवर्तन मंत्रालय

landing.heroSubtitle: by Interactive, Virtuous and Environmental Single-window Hub.
landing.aboutPara1: PARIVESH is a web-based, role-based workflow application which has been developed for online submission and monitoring of the proposals submitted by the proponents for seeking Environment, Forest, Wildlife and CRZ Clearances from Central, State and district level authorities.
landing.aboutPara2: It automates the entire tracking of proposals, which includes online submission of a new proposal, editing/updating the details of proposals and displays at each stage of the workflow.
landing.clearanceSubtitle: Select a service to understand the application requirements, statutory processes, and timelines.
landing.downloadsSubtitle: Access official forms, notification gazettes, and user manuals.
landing.contactSubtitle: Our support team is available from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM (Monday to Saturday) to assist with any technical or procedural queries.
landing.subject: Subject
landing.footerTagline: Single Window Integrated Environmental Management System for Proactive and Responsive Facilitation.

ec.title: Environmental Clearance
ec.desc: Required for projects listed in the Schedule to the EIA Notification. This process ensures that environmental impacts are minimized and mitigated through a rigorous appraisal process.

fc.title: Forest Clearance
fc.desc: Mandatory for the diversion of forest land for non-forest purposes under the Forest (Conservation) Act, 1980.

wc.title: Wild Life Clearance
wc.desc: Required for projects located within Protected Areas or within 10km of National Parks and Sanctuaries.

crz.title: CRZ Clearance
crz.desc: Regulates activities in Coastal Regulation Zones to protect fragile ecosystems and ensure sustainable livelihoods for coastal communities.
